response.original_title: Alien Mysterious: Pyramid Enigmas, Ancient Healing Powers and Illuminati Descendants
response.overview: Recent findings and carbon dating have historians and researchers speculating the true age of the ancient pyramids as well as the true nature of their origins, raising questions about who the actual engineers really were; and the startling conclusions that they may not have been from this world. Coupled with the mystical powers the pyramids hold, including healing and mind control energies resonating from these structures, as well as the elite human race spawned from their creations known today as the Illuminati, shed new light on the looming dangers to Mankind.
response.tagline: Explore recent findings that have historians and researchers speculating on the actual age and nature of the origin of the ancient pyramids.
response.title: Alien Mysterious: Pyramid Enigmas, Ancient Healing Powers and Illuminati Descendants
